name: Origin
recommendation: BUILD — Proceed with egg donation MVP. $40B+ fertility market with 9-10% CAGR, validated by Cofertility's $16M Series A. No existing platform combines AI matching + legal automation + escrow + clinic integration. Launch egg donation only in CA/NY/TX, defer surrogacy to Phase 2. Requires ethics board and reproductive law counsel before build phase.
notes: Build complete: 33 Swift files, Mac Catalyst BUILD SUCCEEDED. Fertility matching platform with 7 models, 6 services, 2 view models, 11 views, 5 design system files.

research_findings.top_competitor: Cofertility ($16M Series A, 225+ clinic partners, egg-sharing model)
research_findings.competitive_gap: No platform combines AI matching + legal automation + escrow + clinic integration in one product
research_findings.regulatory_complexity: HIGH — 50 states + international; egg donation lowest complexity; surrogacy highest
research_findings.hipaa_status: Reproductive Health Rule vacated June 2025; standard HIPAA applies; Origin likely Business Associate if clinic-integrated
research_findings.technical_feasibility: HIGH — all critical APIs validated (Stripe Connect, Stripe Identity, Checkr, DocuSign, FHIR); 14-week MVP estimate
research_findings.mvp_scope: Egg donation matching, 3 US states (CA/NY/TX), AI scoring, escrow, legal templates, messaging, clinic locator
key_risks: Trust barrier for new platform in life-defining decisions
Ethical exploitation concerns require proactive ethics board
Long sales cycles (3-18 month fertility journeys)
